title: Correct: elsif/else chain encoding in flat Stmt
description: WHY THIS IS CORRECT: After reading a block, read_stmt checks tokens.get(pos) for 'elsif' or 'else' and continues collecting into the same Stmt rather than returning. This correctly encodes if/elsif/else chains as a single flat Stmt whose Form sequence is [Word('if'), test..., Block(...), Word('elsif'), test..., Block(...), Word('else'), Block(...)]. Edge cases: if{} with no continuation returns immediately (pos not consumed beyond the RBrace); if{} elsif{} with no else stops after the second block because the next token is not 'elsif'/'else'. Both cases produce well-formed output.
